title: Audit current dashboard wiring gap
goal: Confirm the real file seams for dashboard UI, shell navigation, and existing action handlers.
verification: Document file seams and current wiring status in task notes.
notes: Confirmed that the approved dashboard XAML had no module tile wiring.
Confirmed that SettingsButton_Click, CheckForUpdateButton_Click, and LogoutButton_Click already existed in code-behind but were not hooked from XAML.
Confirmed that BarangayMainViewModel already exposed the shell navigation commands needed for dashboard tile routing.
